name: Chicken with Garlic
recipeInstructions:
If using whole chickens, halve the chickens and bone completely except for the wing joint. If only using breasts, bone completely. Place the heads of garlic in water to cover in a small saucepan and bring to a boil. Drain. Peel the garlic and cut each clove into paper-thin slices. Toss with the parsley and season to taste with salt and pepper.
Loosen the chicken skin and stuff about 2 teaspoons of the garlic mixture between the skin and the meat. Reserve the remaining garlic mixture. Set the chicken aside.
Prepare hot coals in a grill. When the coals are ready, grill the chicken 5 to 7 minutes on each side, or until the flesh is no longer pink. Do not overcook the chicken as it will become dry.
Heat the butter in a skillet and add the reserved garlic mixture. Saute for a few seconds. Add the lemon juice and adjust seasonings. Heat through. Place the chicken on a large heated platter and spoon the garlic sauce over it.
